assessment.note: He links his reduced participation to not knowing what needed to change after the promotion decision — strong engagement drop, with an off-signature clarity issue worth probing next.

new_queue.label: Needed to change
new_queue.name: When you say 'what needed to change' — what felt unclear exactly?
new_queue.description: Clarifies the specific expectation gap he felt after the promotion decision.

new_queue.label: Set the frame
new_queue.name: Before we get into specifics, what would be most useful to talk through today?
new_queue.description: Gives James control over the agenda and establishes a low-pressure starting point.

new_queue.label: What landed
new_queue.name: What feedback do you think landed most clearly for you?
new_queue.description: Surfaces the specific message he heard rather than his general reaction to it.

new_queue.label: Feedback gap
new_queue.name: What part of the feedback still feels unresolved to you?
new_queue.description: Finds the missing piece or ambiguity that may be shaping his next steps.

new_queue.label: Next path
new_queue.name: What concrete path forward do you see for yourself from here?
new_queue.description: Gets James to name the direction he believes is real rather than waiting for the manager to define it.

new_queue.label: First move
new_queue.name: Given what we've covered, where do you want to focus first?
new_queue.description: Ends the conversation with an open, employee-shaped next focus.
